changes: TUI redesign inspired by llmfit (Catppuccin Mocha + monospace + status bar)
Vim-style global shortcuts: 1-6 switch tabs, r refresh, / focus search, ? help
Standard services view migrated from cards to dense table layout
Custom service upload now streams progress (NDJSON) with per-stage status
Image references with uppercase letters are auto-retagged to arbore-<svc>:latest
Backend wraps Portainer network errors as 502 with detailed logs
index.html no longer fetches Google Fonts (full offline-friendly)
